display.purpose: Emergency state headlines, SOS callouts only.

title.purpose: Card titles, shelter names, labeled data.

label.purpose: Nav labels, badges, type chips. All-caps.

shadows.name: neon-ambient
shadows.purpose: Default active-state glow: GPS lock, primary CTA.

shadows.name: alert-ambient
shadows.purpose: SOS button and alert state indicators.

shadows.name: alert-strong
shadows.purpose: Full alert state, radar ring context.

motion.name: ease-drawer
motion.purpose: Drawer slide-up. Aggressive deceleration — feels intentional.

motion.name: ease-radar
motion.purpose: SOS radar ring expansion. Pulses outward with urgency.

motion.name: duration-pulse
motion.purpose: Radar rings, GPS ping, user location pulse.

breakpoints.name: mobile-only
breakpoints.note: App is mobile-first; no desktop breakpoints. PWA full-screen.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA: תכנן מסלול, הוסף מקלט, confirm actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #00E5A0; color: #070D18; font-family: 'Rubik', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 12px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 150ms ease-out; min-height: 44px; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,229,160,0.35), 0 0 40px rgba(0,229,160,0.25); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,229,160,0.35), 0 0 40px rgba(0,229,160,0.25); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: transparent; color: #3D7070; font-family: 'Rubik', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #1A3050; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out; min-height: 44px; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #E6F4F0; border-color: #2A4870; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: rgba(0,229,160,0.5); color: #E6F4F0; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: SOS activation, destructive actions in emergency context only.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #FF1744; color: #E6F4F0; font-family: 'Rubik', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 800; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 12px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 150ms ease-out; min-height: 44px; position: relative; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,23,68,0.35), 0 0 32px rgba(255,23,68,0.25); } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,23,68,0.35), 0 0 32px rgba(255,23,68,0.25); }

components.name: Mode Toggle
components.description: Pill selector for circular vs point-to-point routing mode.
components.css: .ds-mode-toggle { display: flex; background: #070D18; border-radius: 12px; padding: 4px; gap: 0; } .ds-mode-tab { flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; background: transparent; color: #3D7070; font-family: 'Rubik', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; min-height: 36px; } .ds-mode-tab--active { background: #00E5A0; color: #070D18; box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(0,229,160,0.3); }

components.name: Bottom Navigation
components.html: ביתמפהמסלולפרופיל
components.css: .ds-bottom-nav { display: flex; position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; background: rgba(7,13,24,0.92); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border-top: 1px solid rgba(26,48,80,0.8); padding-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px); direction: rtl; } .ds-nav-item { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 10px 8px; text-decoration: none; color: #3D7070; font-family: 'Rubik', sans-serif; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; position: relative; transition: color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-item--active { color: #00E5A0; } .ds-nav-item--active::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 24px; height: 2px; background: #00E5A0; border-radius: 0 0 4px 4px; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(0,229,160,0.8); } .ds-nav-item--active svg { padding: 6px; background: rgba(0,229,160,0.08); border-radius: 12px; }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: Info card for shelters, stats, panels. No side-stripe borders.
components.html:
מקלט קרוב
רחוב הרצל 12, תל אביב
components.css: .ds-card { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0F2035 0%, #0C1929 100%); border: 1px solid rgba(26,48,80,0.9); border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Rubik', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; color: #E6F4F0; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Rubik', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 400; color: #3D7070; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Address search, used on Map and Route pages.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; } .ds-input-icon { position: absolute; right: 12px; color: #3D7070; pointer-events: none; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #0C1929; border: 1px solid #1A3050; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 40px 10px 12px; font-family: 'Rubik', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #E6F4F0; direction: rtl; min-height: 44px; transition: box-shadow 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #3D7070; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: rgba(0,229,160,0.3); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,229,160,0.4); }

narrative.overview:
This system is watchful but not alarmed. It carries the awareness of a runner who knows every shelter on their route — not because they are afraid, but because knowing frees them to run. The interface is the calm hand that guides rather than the siren that shouts.

The aesthetic is built on a simple tension: deep night navy as the canvas of urban night running, punctuated by a live-pulse green that signals readiness rather than danger. Nothing decorates for decoration's sake. Every visual element has a function — distance, direction, status, safety. The rhythm is Israeli: direct, practical, warm despite the dark palette.

This system explicitly rejects the military simulation aesthetic, gaming excess, and SaaS defaults. The Urban Vigil is used outdoors, in motion, under real sky — it should feel like that.
keyCharacteristics: Night-running dark palette: three tonal surface levels, no pure black
Single live-signal accent (Live Pulse green) for all active states
Alert vocabulary (red) reserved strictly for genuine danger
Hebrew-first typography: Rubik at all weights, RTL-native
Glow as the language of depth, not shadow
Touch-first: minimum 44px targets, generous safe-area padding

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Live Pulse appears on active states only. Its presence means the system is live and tracking. Its absence means the system is waiting.

rules.name: The Red-as-Danger Rule
rules.body: Alert Red is reserved for physical emergency contexts only. Form validation uses Text Muted.

rules.name: The Single-Family Rule
rules.body: One typeface, all weights. Hierarchy expressed through weight contrast alone — minimum 1.25 ratio between adjacent levels.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Glow appears only as a state response. A surface with permanent glow is abusing the vocabulary.

dos: Do use Live Pulse exclusively for active, live, confirmed states.
Do use Alert Red exclusively for physical-danger contexts.
Do express depth through tonal surface stepping before reaching for glow.
Do ensure every touch target is minimum 44px in height.
Do use Rubik at weight contrast ≥1.25 between hierarchy levels.
Do keep the map visible through panels using blur and translucency.
Do write copy in Hebrew first, short and imperative.
donts: Don't use military/tactical visual language: no khaki greens, no crosshairs, no tactical type treatments.
Don't use gaming excess: no neon overload, no particle effects, no gamification.
Don't use SaaS defaults: no white surfaces, no blue-primary, no identical card grids.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe accent.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient).
Don't add permanent glow to any element at rest.
Don't open modals as a first response — use drawers or inline expansion.
Don't animate layout properties. Animate transform and opacity only.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing.
